final:
module SR_Latch_DFF(  
    input wire S,  
    input wire R,  
    input wire Enable,  
    output reg Q,  
    output reg Qn  
);  
    always @(posedge Enable) begin
  if (S && !R) begin Q <= 1 ; Qn <= 0 ; end else if (!S && R) begin Q <= 0 ; Qn <= 1 ; end
  end

  always @(posedge Enable) begin
  // If S == 0 and R == 0, maintain state // If S == 1 and R == 1, this case should not occur;
  end  
endmodule
